channel.title: Machines & Cloud Updates
channel.description: Recent guides, insights, benchmark pages, workflow resources, and commercial pages from Machines & Cloud.

item.title: AI Pilot to Production Benchmark
item.description: Benchmark-style resource on why AI pilots stall, which controls separate launches from demos, and what operators should measure.

item.title: OpenAI vs Anthropic for Enterprise Agents
item.description: Practical comparison of OpenAI vs Anthropic for enterprise AI agents, focused on workflow fit, safety patterns, tooling, and operating tradeoffs.

item.title: Copilot Studio vs Custom AI Agents
item.description: Comparison page covering managed platform speed versus custom-agent control, governance depth, and portability.

item.title: RAG vs Agentic Workflows
item.description: Comparison of when retrieval is enough and when a workflow needs tools, approvals, routing, and action logic.

item.title: Agentic AI Consulting
item.description: Commercial page covering workflow selection, governance design, evaluation discipline, and production planning.

item.title: AI Agent Development Services
item.description: Service page for enterprise AI agent development with integrations, approvals, evaluation harnesses, and production launch planning.

item.title: AI Governance Consulting
item.description: Governance consulting page focused on approval gates, audit trails, policy controls, and framework-informed design.

item.title: KYC Automation AI Agent
item.description: Workflow page for KYC automation with cited case summaries, policy checks, and approval-based escalation.

item.title: Claims Intake Automation
item.description: Workflow page for FNOL extraction, coverage validation, triage, and adjuster-ready routing.

item.title: IT Helpdesk AI Agent
item.description: Workflow page for ticket triage, knowledge retrieval, response drafting, and approval-aware helpdesk automation.

item.title: WISMO Automation
item.description: Workflow page for order-status automation, exception routing, returns support, and customer-service deflection.

item.title: Guides and Playbooks
item.description: Production-ready guides and playbooks for governance, evaluation, workflow readiness, and rollout discipline.

item.title: Insights
item.description: Market insights, buyer psychology, and thought leadership on agentic AI automation and production delivery.
